headline: Korea Trading Surges 70% on Tech Giants

article.title: Samsung, SK Hynix and Leveraged ETFs Drive 70% of Korea Trading
article.summary: Retail fervor over leveraged ETFs in South Korea has grown so intense that the products, together with the two chipmaker stocks they track, now make up more than 70% of trading value in the $4.3 trillion market.
